ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "architecture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the architecture used by the model */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the model */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the model */,
  "contemp" INTEGER /* Contemporary details of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the model */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_architecture_id FOREIGN KEY ("architecture_id") REFERENCES model_architectures ("architecture_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_architectures" (
  "architecture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each architecture */,
  "architecture_name" TEXT /* Name of the architecture */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the architecture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("architecture_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_component_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component used in the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_component_links_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES model_components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_component_links_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the performance metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when this version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the model was deployed (e.g., production, staging) */,
  "deployed_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was deployed */,
  "undeployed_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was undeployed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_deployments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_search_history" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the search */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Search query used to find models */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the search was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_search_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
